def negative_quadratic_string_building_via_plus_equals():
    rule_id = "quadratic_string_building_via_plus_equals"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag loops that grow large strings with repeated +=."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
